name: CIS Microsoft Windows 11 Enterprise Benchmark v2.0.0 (subset)
_comment: Portfolio demonstration subset. Not a complete CIS-CAT replacement. Controls span RegistryValue, AuditPolicy, ServiceState, SecurityPolicy, and Manual types.

controls.title: Ensure 'Enforce password history' is set to '24 or more password(s)'
controls.remediation: Computer Configuration > Windows Settings > Security Settings > Account Policies > Password Policy > Enforce password history = 24

controls.title: Ensure 'Maximum password age' is set to '365 or fewer days, but not 0'
controls.remediation: Computer Configuration > Windows Settings > Security Settings > Account Policies > Password Policy > Maximum password age = 365 or fewer (not 0)

controls.title: Ensure 'Accounts: Block Microsoft accounts' is set to 'Users can't add or log on with Microsoft accounts'
controls.remediation: Computer Configuration > Windows Settings > Security Settings > Local Policies > Security Options > Accounts: Block Microsoft accounts = Users can't add or log on with Microsoft accounts

controls.title: Ensure 'Interactive logon: Do not require CTRL+ALT+DEL' is set to 'Disabled'
controls.remediation: Computer Configuration > Windows Settings > Security Settings > Local Policies > Security Options > Interactive logon: Do not require CTRL+ALT+DEL = Disabled

controls.title: Ensure 'Network access: Restrict anonymous access to Named Pipes and Shares' is set to 'Enabled'
controls.remediation: Computer Configuration > Windows Settings > Security Settings > Local Policies > Security Options > Network access: Restrict anonymous access to Named Pipes and Shares = Enabled

controls.title: Ensure 'Microsoft network server: Digitally sign communications (always)' is set to 'Enabled'
controls.remediation: Computer Configuration > Windows Settings > Security Settings > Local Policies > Security Options > Microsoft network server: Digitally sign communications (always) = Enabled

controls.title: Ensure 'Bluetooth Audio Gateway Service (BTAGService)' is set to 'Disabled'
controls.remediation: Computer Configuration > Windows Settings > Security Settings > System Services > Bluetooth Audio Gateway Service = Disabled

controls.title: Ensure 'Bluetooth Support Service (bthserv)' is set to 'Disabled'
controls.remediation: Computer Configuration > Windows Settings > Security Settings > System Services > Bluetooth Support Service = Disabled

controls.title: Ensure 'Audit Credential Validation' is set to 'Success and Failure'
controls.remediation: Computer Configuration > Windows Settings > Security Settings > Advanced Audit Policy Configuration > Account Logon > Audit Credential Validation = Success and Failure

controls.title: Ensure 'Audit Account Lockout' is set to 'Failure'
controls.remediation: Computer Configuration > Windows Settings > Security Settings > Advanced Audit Policy Configuration > Logon/Logoff > Audit Account Lockout = Failure

controls.title: Ensure 'Audit Audit Policy Change' is set to 'Success'
controls.remediation: Computer Configuration > Windows Settings > Security Settings > Advanced Audit Policy Configuration > Policy Change > Audit Audit Policy Change = Success

controls.title: Ensure 'Configure Attack Surface Reduction rules' is set to 'Enabled'
controls.remediation: Computer Configuration > Administrative Templates > Windows Components > Microsoft Defender Antivirus > Microsoft Defender Exploit Guard > Attack Surface Reduction > Configure Attack Surface Reduction rules = Enabled. Manual verification required — rule GUIDs must be reviewed per environment.

controls.title: Ensure LAPS (Local Administrator Password Solution) is installed and configured
controls.remediation: Install Microsoft LAPS or Windows LAPS (built-in on Windows 11 22H2+) and configure via Group Policy: Computer Configuration > Administrative Templates > System > LAPS. Manual verification required — check that the AdmPwd or LAPS policy is applied and passwords are rotating.
